{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flagged at least one claim the evidence does not support (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).",
    "R1.6": "The agent improved some problem paragraphs, but could have done more to polish the text.",
    "RX.1": "The agent did not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stayed within scope, but had one drift (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).",
    "RX.4": "The output was harm-free, but had one minor regression (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).",
    "RX.5": "The agent did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.8,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flagged at least one claim the evidence does not support (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).
rationale.R1.6: The agent improved some problem paragraphs, but could have done more to polish the text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent did not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope, but had one drift (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free, but had one minor regression (note on Amazon and Twitter numbers).
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
